---
title: "HW5 Q1"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
require(maps)
require(mapdata)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r cars}
state <- map_data("state")
california <- state %>% filter(region=="california")
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
load('wind_turbines.rda')
```

```{r}
wind_ca <- wind_turbines %>% filter(t_state=="CA")
wind_ca
```

```{r}
base <- ggplot() + geom_polygon(data = california, aes(x=long, y = lat, group = group)) +
  coord_fixed(1.3)

base+geom_point(data=wind_ca, aes(x = xlong, y = ylat), color="coral1")
```
